descriptions.text:
自己責任で入ってください！

外は怖いと思っているなら、地下室を見たら驚くこと間違いなし。あなたは人生最長の夜を迎えることになります。幽霊、ゴブリン、悪魔、オオカミ、コウモリ – 隅々に潜むクリーチャーたち。深く深く降りていくほど、彼らはますます増えていきます。洞窟の床にしっかりとくっついているのが賢明です - 武器を見つける唯一のチャンスです。あなたはそれを必要とするでしょう。なぜなら、ついにカウントと対面する時が来たら、彼はあなたの首筋を狙ってくるからです。だから、勇気を持ち続け、杭を鋭く保ってください。そして、祈りを捧げましょう。
The cartridge re-release for the Famicom added an easy mode, available from the start.

Akumajō Dracula (Japanese: 悪魔城ドラキュラ, Hepburn: Akumajō Dorakyura; lit. "Demon Castle Dracula") is the Japanese name of the Castlevania video game series, as it is known worldwide. In Japan, several games within the series share the Akumajō Dracula name:

Castlevania, a 1986 action-platform game developed and published by Konami for the Famicom Disk System and Nintendo Entertainment System.
Vampire Killer, a 1986 platform game developed and published by Konami for the MSX2.
Haunted Castle, a 1987 action-platform game developed and published by Konami for arcades.
Super Castlevania IV, a 1991 action-platform game developed and published by Konami for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System.
Akumajō Dracula, re-released as Castlevania Chronicles, a 1993 action-platform game developed and published by Konami for the X68000.
